creator: achilov-rn@askd.ru
text:
This is a port update up to 0.8.1 version. Version 0.8.1 is a security release, where all support utilites (smb4k_mount, smb4k_umount etc.) were rewritten from scratch to be more secure. From author's Changelog:
 Rewrote smb4k_mount, smb4k_umount, smb4k_kill, smb4k_cat, and smb4k_mv from scratch in order to fix several security weaknesses discovered by Ben Hutchings (should finally close #9631).
Also there are bunch of another fixes

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
